name: Gyoza (Pot Stickers)
recipeIngredient: 8 1/2 oz Waterchestnuts, Canned, Drain and Chop
3 cups Fat-Free Vegetarian Broth (Chicken or Regular)
1/2 cup Fat-Free Vegetarian Broth (Chicken or Regular)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the first six ingredients.
2. Place 1 tablespoon on the center of each Gyoza wrapper. Moisten the edge and fold over to make a half circle, sealing the edges.
3. Flatten the straight edge to stand upright. Repeat with remaining Gyoza.
4. Spray a 10-inch skillet with nonstick cooking spray. Stand half the filled Gyoza upright in a single layer.
5. Cook over low heat until lightly browned on the bottom. Add 1 1/2 cups broth, cover the pan, and simmer for 15 minutes or until tender.
6. Lift out with a spatula onto a serving plate. Repeat with remaining Gyoza.
7. Serve with Vinegar Sauce. Filling and sauce serve 14 oz package of Gyoza wrappers.
8. Vinegar Sauce: Combine the cider vinegar and chicken broth, soy sauce, chili powder, and ground ginger; mix well. Makes 1 cup. Tastes better the second day after being made.
9. Note: Filled Gyoza can be frozen if desired. Place in a single layer on a pan covered with plastic wrap. Freeze, then wrap well. Thaw in the refrigerator several hours before cooking.
